## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 13.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 20.x]
- **AgentMD version**: [e.g. 0.1.1]
- **Package**: [e.g. @agentmd-dev/core, @agentmd-dev/cli, VS Code extension]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## AGENTS.md File (if applicable)
If the bug is related to parsing/validation, please provide the AGENTS.md content that caused the issue.

```markdown
<!-- Your AGENTS.md content here -->
```

## Logs
Please include any relevant error messages or logs.
